name: Swing365 - Sioux Falls
about: Swing365 - Sioux Falls offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience in a private club atmosphere. The venue provides access to Full Swing™ simulators with infrared technology for precise ball flight measurement. Members enjoy 365/24/7 tee time booking for individual suites, designed for convenience and privacy. The facility allows members to bring their own food and beverages, creating a flexible and comfortable environment for practice or social rounds.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Full Swing™ simulator technology with infrared tracking
Private club atmosphere for an exclusive experience
Convenient 365/24/7 online booking system for individual suites
Ability to bring your own food and beverages
Membership-based access guarantees availability and privacy

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring their own food
Members are allowed to bring their own beverages (BYOB)

simulator_hardware.notes: Features infrared technology with 688 sensors across two tracks

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are available. Members are advised to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are allowed to bring their own food and beverages (BYOB/Food).

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: While the website doesn't specify, typical simulator sessions are 60-90 minutes depending on the membership tier.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears to be focused on an adult, membership-based experience and does not highlight kid-friendly features.
